infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TSN needs microphone access to record your voice identity note that broadcasts during SOS alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TSN needs your location to send accurate emergency alerts to police.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: TSN needs your location to send accurate emergency alerts to police.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TSN needs camera access to take your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TSN needs photo library access to update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TSN needs to save photos to your library.

web.name: TSN - Taxi Safety Network
web.description: Emergency alert system for taxi drivers in Cameroon

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: TSN needs your location to send accurate emergency alerts.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: TSN needs background location to monitor your safety.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: TSN needs your location to send accurate emergency alerts.

plugins.microphonePermission: TSN needs microphone access to record your voice identity note.
